is a [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") club in [Otjiwarongo](/wiki/Otjiwarongo "Otjiwarongo"), Namibia. It plays in the [Namibia Premier League](/wiki/Namibia_Premier_League "Namibia Premier League") and in [Mokati Stadium](/wiki/Mokati_Stadium "Mokati Stadium").[[1]](#cite_note-1) The club is formed up by members of the [Namibian Army](/wiki/Namibian_Army "Namibian Army")'s [4 Artillery Brigade (Namibia)](/wiki/4_Artillery_Brigade_(Namibia) "4 Artillery Brigade (Namibia)") based in Otjiwarongo.

**Mighty Gunners** is a [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") club in [Otjiwarongo](/wiki/Otjiwarongo "Otjiwarongo"), Namibia. It plays in the [Namibia Premier League](/wiki/Namibia_Premier_League "Namibia Premier League") and in [Mokati Stadium](/wiki/Mokati_Stadium "Mokati Stadium").[[1]](#cite_note-1) The club is formed up by members of the [Namibian Army](/wiki/Namibian_Army "Namibian Army")'s [4 Artillery Brigade (Namibia)](/wiki/4_Artillery_Brigade_(Namibia) "4 Artillery Brigade (Namibia)") based in Otjiwarongo.
